title: pallets/flask
script:
Hello, developers! Ever wish you could create a web application in no time at all? Well, you're in luck today!

Introducing Flask, the go-to lightweight web application framework for Python.

Flask is a simple wrapper around Werkzeug and Jinja, allowing you to start building web apps quickly. It's flexible, giving you the freedom to choose your dependencies and project layout.

With Flask, you can add new features effortlessly thanks to a vibrant community that offers numerous extensions.

So, whether you're a beginner or a seasoned pro, Flask has you covered. Let's make web development easy, efficient, and enjoyable!
